subcodes.first_line: All the peoples of the nations were promised this Most Great Day, which in the divine Books is known as the Day of God, and when [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع احزاب امم باین یوم اعظم که در کتب الهی بیوم الله معروف است وعده داده شدند و چون
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
